title: Nolando Loot
description: Guns and ammo can now be found across structures in Nolando StructureZ! (Requires Timeless and Classics: Zero)
body:
This mod injects guns from the Timeless and Classics: Zero mod into structures of the Nolando StructureZ mod. 



If you are into building zombie apocalypse modpacks, also try Nolando Apocalypse!
